hypothesis: Replacing the CATS-based pharmacophore term in the RL reward with conformer-ensemble USRCAT 3D pharmacophore similarity, while keeping structural dissimilarity penalties and weights unchanged, will yield at least a twofold increase in the proportion of generated ERα antagonists achieving IC50 ≤ 1 μM in vitro compared with the current pipeline at matched novelty (Tanimoto ≤ 0.35) and synthetic accessibility (SA ≤ 5) thresholds.
